creator: obrien@NUXI.com
text:
Using http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr-summary.cgi?query
	with "sort by responcible party" doesn't sort correctly.  I expected
	this to be the primary sort key, but severity seems to be, with 
	responcibile party being the secondary key.

Fix: 

???
How-To-Repeat: 
	Try a querry with "sort by responcible party", categor "Ports", and the
	reset of the fields set to "Any".
